title: Sculptural Seven-Suite Villa Above Kata Beach
blurb: Set high on the hillside above Kata Beach, a sculptural contemporary villa with one of the largest built-up footprints on Phuket's west coast — seven sea-facing suites, walls of glass, and a signature infinity pool reaching toward the Andaman horizon.
detail:
Part of a boutique, low-density estate of just eight homes, this villa is designed across multiple levels to chase the sea view and the light. 753 m² of internal space opens through floor-to-ceiling glazing onto a commanding Andaman panorama, while sliding panels fold the entire façade away so the main living level — a grand open-plan lounge, dining area and contemporary kitchen — flows straight out to the infinity pool.

Seven bedrooms and ten bathrooms include a panoramic master suite with a spa-style bath and extensive wardrobes; every additional suite is sea-facing and ensuite. A private spa room, a fully equipped fitness room and two staff rooms sit discreetly across the lower levels, alongside an estate clubhouse with elevated sea-view decks inspired by the work of Kerry Hill Architects.

Professional property management and a private concierge are built into ownership — covering maintenance, housekeeping and rental operations — with Kata's beaches, beach clubs and dining a short descent from the hillside.
